examples: The flights returned to RAF Brize Norton in 2011 when it was announced that RAF Lyneham would close.
Repatriations were switched from Brize Norton to RAF Lyneham in 2007, meaning public ceremonies were held at nearby Wootton Bassett.
The Hercules transporter planes, which were the heart of RAF Lyneham, left last year for RAF Brize Norton in Oxfordshire.
